scripts.db:sync: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); require('./src/config/database').sync({ force: true }).then(() => { console.log('DB synced'); process.exit(0); }).catch((e) => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.db:alter: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); require('./src/config/database').sync({ alter: true }).then(() => { console.log('DB alter OK'); process.exit(0); }).catch((e) => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
